news.title: DiligenceSquared uses AI, voice agents to make M&A research affordable
news.summary: Instead of relying on expensive management consultants, the startup uses AI voice agents to conduct interviews with customers of the companies the PE firms are considering buying.

news.title: Cluely CEO Roy Lee admits to publicly lying about revenue numbers last year
news.summary: The $7 million in annual recurring revenue that Cluely CEO Roy Lee shared last summer was a lie, its founder and CEO Roy Lee admitted on Thursday on X.
